chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-408 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For orders on CMA 1896/25 3.For hearing of main case 29-04-2025 None present for the petitioners. M/s Saeed Ahmed Wassan, AAG and Khalil Ahmed Maitlo, DPG a/w SIP Tariq Hussain, I.O of P.S. B-section, Khairpur. **** None present for the petitioners; no intimation is received. Mr. Farooque Ali Halepoto, Advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondent No.1, taken on record. Statements filed by respondents No.2&3 are taken on record. I.O submits that after recording statement of alleged abductee/petitioner No.1 in terms of section 164 CrPC, he disposed of the case under C-class and such summary is pending before the concerned Magistrate for passing appropriate orders. Since no one is in attendance on behalf of petitioners, this petition is disposed of along with listed application with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioners in accordance with law. However, the Magistrate concerned is at liberty to pass appropriate orders on summary pending before him. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
